description: Well-established scientific fact should be verified as true
Thoroughly debunked claim should be verified as false
Pure opinion should have no claims extracted and be unverifiable
input_text: Pizza is the best food ever invented.

description: Mixed factual and opinion text - should extract only the fact
input_text: The Eiffel Tower is 330 meters tall, and it's the most beautiful structure ever built.

description: Dangerous health misinformation should be identified as false
Common verifiable statistic should be confirmed
input_text: About 70% of Earth's surface is covered by water.

description: Popular myth that has been debunked should be identified
input_text: The Great Wall of China is visible from space with the naked eye.

description: Recent well-established scientific fact should be verified
input_text: COVID-19 is caused by a coronavirus called SARS-CoV-2.

description: Trivial unimportant facts should produce no check-worthy claims and be unverifiable
input_text: I went to the store yesterday and it was a weekday.
